steps.title: Spot the sentence boundary
steps.content: "Ensuring that proteins retain their original configurations" completes one clause. The next words start a new independent clause with its own subject, TMAO, and verb, "is found."

steps.title: Separate the clauses
steps.content: B fuses the two independent clauses with no punctuation. C creates a comma splice. D joins the clauses with "and" in a way that makes the sentence awkward and ungrammatical. The answer is A.
